caption: A person stands on a stage during a presentation, positioned to the left of a large projection screen. The speaker is dressed in a dark suit and is gesturing with their hands while speaking. The background features branding for "has geek" and "exotel." Across the sequence, the projection screen displays a series of slides explaining a tool called Heka. The first slide is titled "Why? (The Problem)" and lists issues regarding "Events:", "Application Developer:", and "DevOps Team:". The next two slides both bear the title "What? (is Heka)" and describe it as "a high performance, extremely extensible tool for gathering, analyzing, monitoring and reporting data" with "Simple Semantics: Acquire data, Transform data, Output data." It is further described as being "Internally modeled as a generic message router" and a "Swiss Army Knife." The final slide, also titled "What? (is Heka)", lists "Various Inputs" like "Logs," "TCP / UDP / HTTP," and "StatsD," along with "Inbuilt Realtime Graphing" and "Complex Processing" including "Aggregation" and "Anomaly detection (including Alerting!)."
